hero.headline:
Transparent Pool Care You Can
Actually Trust
hero.subheadline: Tired of pool companies that overcharge and underdeliver? Captains Pool Care sends photo proof after every visit, never surprises you with hidden fees, and backs every service with a money-back guarantee. Just honest, professional pool care across Atlanta.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Professional Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for Every Atlanta Home
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency repairs, our Certified Pool Operators handle it all so you can spend your time swimming instead of scrubbing.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
cards.description: Regular cleaning, water chemistry balancing, skimming, brushing, and vacuuming. You get a detailed photo-proof service report after every single visit.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning & Recovery
cards.description: One-time deep cleans, seasonal openings, and green-to-clean algae removal. We bring neglected pools back to crystal clear fast.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Service
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems. Weekly maintenance customers get free repair work included.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Winterization
cards.description: Seasonal services to properly open your pool for summer or protect it through Georgia winters. Keep your investment safe year-round.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Services
cards.description: Professional maintenance for apartments, hotels, and HOA communities across the Atlanta metro. Consistent service with detailed reporting.

cards.title: Filter System Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough cleaning and maintenance of your pool filtration system to ensure optimal water circulation, clarity, and equipment longevity.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Get Your Free Quote
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we provide instant, transparent pricing. No hidden fees, no pressure, no contracts required.

steps.title: We Do the Work Right
steps.description: Our CPO-certified, background-checked technicians arrive on schedule. After every visit, you receive before-and-after photo proof via email.

steps.title: Swim with Confidence
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready all season. Not satisfied? Our money-back guarantee means you never risk a penny.

about.label: Why Atlanta Trusts the Captain
about.headline: Built by an Entrepreneur Who Demanded Better Pool Service
about.description: After 30 years in business, our founder was frustrated by poor-quality pool companies that overcharged and underdelivered. So he started Captains Pool Care to prove it could be done right. Every technician is a Certified Pool Operator who passes criminal background checks. We send you photo proof after every visit and never surprise you with upsells. If we fall short, you get your money back.

features.title: Background-Checked & CPO Certified
features.description: Every technician is a Certified Pool Operator who passes a criminal background check before entering your backyard.

features.title: Transparent Pricing, No Upsells
features.description: You see the price upfront before we start. No surprise charges, no add-ons, no games. What we quote is what you pay.

features.title: Money-Back Guarantee
features.description: Not satisfied with any service? We refund your money, no questions asked. That is how confident we are in our work.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: See your price upfront before we start. No contracts, no hidden fees, and weekly customers get free repairs included.

guarantee.headline: Our Money-Back Service Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, we will make it right or refund your money. Every visit includes before-and-after photo proof so you can see exactly what was done. We believe in earning your trust with results, not promises.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are scheduled within the same week. We service the greater Atlanta metro area including Buckhead, Alpharetta, Dunwoody, Sandy Springs, and Roswell. Just call or fill out the form and we will get you on the schedule fast.

faqs.question: What makes Captains Pool Care different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: Every technician is a Certified Pool Operator with a clean background check. We send before-and-after photo proof after every visit, never surprise you with upsells, and back every service with a money-back guarantee. We were founded specifically to fix what is broken in this industry.

faqs.question: Do I need to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: No contracts, ever. We earn your business every single visit. You can cancel anytime with zero fees or penalties. We keep customers because of our results, not fine print.

faqs.question: What is included in weekly pool maintenance?
faqs.answer: Skimming, brushing, vacuuming, chemical testing and balancing, filter checks, and equipment inspection. After every visit you receive a detailed service report with before-and-after photos. Weekly customers also get free repair work included.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial properties?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We maintain pools for apartments, hotels, and HOA communities throughout the Atlanta metro area. Commercial clients receive consistent, professional service with detailed reporting for property management.

testimonials.name: Nancy P.
testimonials.text: Captains Pool Care is simply outstanding! This is by far the best pool service company we worked with. They are professional, reliable, and our pool has never looked better.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: The level of professionalism I received from this company exceeded my expectations. They were prompt, knowledgeable, friendly, and offered great customer service. I cannot say enough good things!

testimonials.name: Airbnb Property Mgr.
testimonials.text: I am absolutely thrilled with the service. The team is very professional, punctual, and incredibly thorough. My pools have never looked better than they do now.
